title: SpiderMan
description: Unlock Spider-Man abilities in survival or via commands. Get bitten by a spider, survive mutation, eat a golden apple, and gain superhuman powers and a web shooter.
body:
# 🕷️ Spider-Man Abilities

Swing through Minecraft like Spider-Man! Crawl up walls, zip across buildings, trap enemies in webs — all with survival-friendly powers you earn, not just start with.  

---

## 🧬 How to Become Spider-Man

You don’t get superpowers for free — you have to earn them:

1. **Get bitten** by a Spider or Cave Spider  
2. **Eat a Golden Apple** while the venom is in your system  
3. Your mutation completes — you’re Spider-Man  

> Abilities and web shooters persist through death and server restarts.  
> Server admins can grant or remove powers with `/spiderman <player>`.

---

## Your Abilities

### 🕸️ Web Swing
**Right-click** with your web shooter to fire a web at any surface above you. If it latches, you’ll swing automatically — release early or chain swings to fly across a city.  

- Steering and momentum can build speed 
- Left-click or sneak to release early   

---

### ⚡ Web Zip
**Left-click** with your web shooter to zip instantly to blocks or entities. Great for closing gaps or escaping danger.  

---

### 🕷️ Wall Climb
**Sneak near any solid wall** while airborne or grounded to climb.  

- Climb up walls by jumping and pressing shift
- Detaches automatically when moving away from the wall  

---

### 🌐 Web Spray
**Sneak + Right-click** to launch a web grenade.  

- **Against mobs/players:** Slowness V, Jump Suppression, briefly trapped in cobwebs  
- **Against blocks:** Covers a 3×2×3 area with temporary cobwebs (disappears after a few seconds)  

---

### Passive Bonuses
While Spider-Man, you also gain:  

- **Strength I** — more melee damage  
- **Regeneration I** — faster health recovery  
- **50% reduced fall damage** — survive high falls  

---

## 🔧 Commands & Permissions

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---|---|---|
| `/spiderman <player>` | Toggle Spider-Man abilities on/off | `spiderman.admin` (default: OP) |

---

## 📋 Requirements

- **Paper 1.21+**
- **Java 21+**  

---

## Recommended: Play on a City Map

- Swing between skyscrapers, zip across streets, and test your full range of abilities in a map designed for Spider-Man fun! (I used https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/mit-city/)
- Enable Flight in your server settings to prevent false kicking/banning
